betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Cyclotron§f

§aParticle accelerator that bombards element powders to create heavier elements — and antimatter!§f

The §bCyclotron§f is a multiblock machine that bombards element powders with element boxes to produce heavier elements. It consumes massive amounts of power and can produce antimatter as a byproduct. If not properly cooled, it can cause a catastrophic explosion resembling a small nuclear detonation.

§6Construction§f (Assembly Factory):
§b• 1×§f Lithium-Ion Battery
§b• 32×§f Dense Neodymium Wire
§b• 16×§f Steel Ingot
§b• 32×§f Steel Plate
§b• 32×§f Aluminium Plate
§b• 24×§f Bakelite Bar
§b• 24×§f Rubber Bar
§b• 8×§f Cast Copper Plate
§b• 16×§f Integrated Circuit Board

§6Element Boxes§f (made in Assembly Machine: 1 powder → 1 box):
§b• Lithium, Beryllium, Carbon, Copper, Plutonium§f

§6Operation§f:
• Stores §e100 MHE§f internal buffer
• §e32,000 mB§f water capacity
• Consumes §e690 MHE§f §eper operation§f
• Use all 3 slots at once for best efficiency
• Produces antimatter as byproduct (heavier elements = more antimatter)
• §e8,000 mB§f internal antimatter storage

§6Antischrabidium§f: Bombard an §bantimatter cell§f with §bplutonium§f — does NOT produce antimatter byproduct.

§6Cooling§f: Water converts to Low-Pressure Steam rapidly. Requires §bhalf an auxiliary cooling tower§f for continuous operation.

§6Output Uses§f: Most elements produced are intermediates for §bNitanium§f, §bDesh§f, or rare earth elements like §bAustralium§f.

§eTip§f: Only use the cyclotron for very rare elements or antimatter — it's wildly expensive to run. At §e690 MHE§f per operation, you need a serious power setup! If you can run it consistently (e.g., with a mining ship), it becomes an energy-matter fabricator.
